instruction: Give two practical checks before launching a local GPU QLoRA smoke run.

candidate_a.label: static_placeholder
candidate_a.text: Confirm the output directory is ignored by git and record the expected runtime and VRAM range before launching.

candidate_b.label: dynamic_placeholder
candidate_b.text: Start the run immediately and inspect logs only after it finishes.

provenance.note: Synthetic local pair for judge formatting validation only; not a model evaluation result.

instruction: State why a local Qwen2.5-1.5B QLoRA smoke run cannot prove 8B full fine-tuning behavior.

candidate_a.label: static_placeholder
candidate_a.text: It uses a smaller model, QLoRA adapters, tiny data, and few steps, so it validates the fallback pipeline rather than full fine-tuning behavior.

candidate_b.label: dynamic_placeholder
candidate_b.text: If the loss decreases, the result proves the same method works for all larger models.

provenance.note: Synthetic local pair for judge formatting validation only; not a model evaluation result.
